name: IdsEdwFcltyBedDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_stage1 AS ( SELECT bed.FCLTY_BED_SK, COALESCE(srcsys.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS raw_SRC_SYS_CD, bed.PROV_ID, bed.FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD_SK, bed.PROV_SK, bed.FCLTY_BED_CT, COALESCE(typ.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD, COALESCE(typ.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.FCLTY_BED bed LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG srcsys ON bed.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = srcsys.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG typ ON bed.FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD_SK = typ.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte_stage2 AS ( SELECT FCLTY_BED_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(raw_SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE raw_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD END AS FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_SK, FCLTY_BED_CT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE raw_FCLTY_BED_TYP_NM END AS FCLTY_BED_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte_stage1 ) SELECT FCLTY_BED_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ID, FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_SK, FCLTY_BED_CT, FCLTY_BED_TYP_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte_stage2

Annotations:
Job name: IdsEdwFcltyBedDExtr


Job Extract data from IDS table and apply Fkey and Code denormalization, create a load ready file.
Read data from source table FCLTY_BED_D
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys:
CD_MPPNG_SK
FCLTY_BED_TYP_CD_SK
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Write FCLTY_BED_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Ready Job.
